sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27621" key="difrou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διφρ-οῦχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n27621.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a seat,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἅρμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0373.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Melanipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
